title: Tatami-chan's a Tokyoite Now
overview: House spirit Tatami-chan moves to Tokyo from the countryside and meets some colorful characters at her new apartment.

title: You Shall Not Pass, Tatami-chan
overview: Tatami-chan has a hard time getting through the train ticket gates in Tokyo.

title: A Horror Story! Inanogawa-san
overview: Tatami-chan’s neighbor offers to cheer her up after some losses at pachinko by telling horror stories.

title: Karaoke Party of One
overview: Tatami-chan goes to a karaoke box, where she gets bullied by mean Tokyoite shop staff.

title: Do You Know Social Media?
overview: Tatami-chan serves up some savage truth about social media.

title: Hot Guy Hell and Mixers
overview: Tatami-chan and the apartment crew go to a mixer and meet some unsavory dudes.

title: Tickling Priest's Meditation Group
overview: Tatami-chan and the nincompoops get roped into a meditation session with Tickling Priest.

title: A Party of Monsters!
overview: The monsters get together for a drinking party. They can’t decide on who picks up the bill.

title: Coup Coup Coup Couple Coucouple Ouples
overview: Tatami and the landlady come across a couple fighting at the station.

title: Tatami-chan and the Furious Ramen Chef
overview: The landlady and Tatami-chan meet a ramen chef with a huge attitude.

title: Let's Read Some Fancy T-shirts!
overview: The girls go to the park to mock people wearing tacky shirts.

title: It's a Halloween Party, Tatami-chan
overview: It’s a Halloween monster mash! Except the monsters aren’t the real monsters.
